commit.message:
Add model description cache to survive model row deletions

Enriched descriptions are now cached in a dedicated model_description_cache
table. When a model is deleted by remove_stale_models (e.g. during node
maintenance) and later rediscovered, the enrichment loop restores the
description from cache instead of repeating the web search + LLM call.

commit.message:
feat: Implementar mejoras de UI/UX para mayor claridad

CAMBIOS REALIZADOS:

Fase 1: KPIs más claros
- "Gasto Quincenal" → "Gasto de los últimos 15 días"
- "Margen de Ahorro" → "Ahorro del mes"
- "Gasto Diario Promedio" → "Promedio diario de gastos"
- "Facturas Procesadas" → "Facturas registradas"
- Mejorado contexto de trends con información más útil

Fase 2: Tabs más claras
- "Registro Diario" → "Historial de Compras"
- "Productos más Costosos" → "Productos más Caros"
- "Gasto por Tienda" → "Gasto por Proveedor"
- "Recordatorios" → "Productos para Reposicionar"
- Descripciones más prácticas y claras

Fase 3: Tooltips contextuales
- Botón actualizar: "Recargar datos desde Supabase"
- Notificaciones: "Alertas y recordatorios pendientes"
- Barra de presupuesto: "Progreso del presupuesto mensual"
- Tooltips nativos sin JavaScript adicional

Fase 4: Pestaña Ayuda en Settings
- Nueva pestaña con guía completa del usuario
- Atajos de teclado (⌘K, Esc)
- Explicación de secciones principales
- Términos importantes (Quincena, KPIs, etc.)
- Tips de productividad
- Sistema de tabs simple y seguro

RIESGO TOTAL: Muy bajo (2.5/10)
- Solo cambios de texto y componentes simples
- Sin lógica de negocio modificada
- Cada fase es un commit independiente
- Fácil de revertir si es necesario

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- React 19 + Vite 7 frontend with Events dashboard, event creation/editing,
  platform publishing controls, and service connection page

  Outfit/Quicksand fonts, cream background, rounded corners

Convert SocialiseHub to an Electron desktop app with:
- Electron main process that boots Express server internally

commit.message:
Fix syntax error in scaffold bundles — escape \n sequences properly

\n inside TypeScript template literals becomes actual newlines, making
single-quoted JS string literals in the generated bundle span multiple
lines (syntax error). Use \n so the output contains valid \n escapes.
Script-level syntax errors don't fire window.onerror — they just produce
a blank white iframe with no visible error, which is why this was hard to spot.

commit.message:
Add NPU sharpening via Windows.AI.MachineLearning (Hexagon NPU)

OnnxBuilder.cs: generates a 3x3 depthwise unsharp-mask ONNX model
in-memory (no external file) using hand-written protobuf encoding.

SrPipeline.cs: complete implementation —
  - Loads in-memory ONNX via LearningModel.LoadFromStreamAsync
  - LearningModelDeviceKind.DirectXMinPower → Hexagon NPU on Snapdragon X
  - GPU BGRA texture → CPU float NCHW → NPU inference → CPU float → GPU
  - ITensorNative COM QI for zero-copy output; GetAsVectorView fallback
  - Cached staging textures; re-entrancy guard

D3DFramebufferControl: NpuSharpenEnabled property — when true, NPU
sharpening replaces CAS; lazy SrPipeline.InitAsync() on first enable.

UI: NPU toggle switch + GPU CAS sharpness slider (mutually exclusive).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: add README with screenshots and usage guide

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(frontend): use native form submission instead of click handler

Submit buttons now use on_click: None to rely on native form submit
event, fixing double-submit issues caused by both the click handler
and the form submit event firing simultaneously.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix dashboard process surviving SSH disconnect (setsid + disown)

Also add python3.12 to search path in start.sh.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(filelock): add advisory locking for template and rename mutations

Add `with_template()` helper to `filelock.rs` following the existing
`with_config()`/`with_metadata()` pattern. All 6 template mutation
handlers (repo add/rm, config set/unset, agent-md set/unset) now
acquire an exclusive lock before read-modify-write.

Also fix `workspace::rename` to use `with_metadata()` for its metadata
update, preventing concurrent `repo add`/`describe` from losing writes.

Found via security audit of all file operations in the codebase.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Replace escalation music system with per-boss tracks

Each boss now has a dedicated music field in arena-bosses.json.
arena-audio.js maps boss IDs directly to track filenames (boss-*.mp3).
Removed checkMusicEscalation() and the round/HP-based logic entirely.
Battle start plays the boss track immediately via playBossMusic(bossId).
Menu/lobby plays arena-menu01.wav as before.

commit.message:
Add independent horizon selector to Discover (corto/medio/largo)

Profile (Conservative/Balanced/Aggressive) and horizon (Short/Medium/Long)
are now independent dimensions. User selects both separately.

- Frontend: new horizon selector with 3 options showing timeframe details
- API: accepts horizon parameter (corto/medio/largo)
- Backend: validates horizon, passes to generate_recommendations()
- Claude prompt: uses horizon to determine stop levels and timeframe
- Weekly candle analysis now included for all profiles (not just conservative)

commit.message:
ci: Dependency Review — bloque licences copyleft + CVE critiques sur PR

Workflow GitHub Dependency Review (actions/dependency-review-action@v4) :
- Deny list : GPL-1/2/3, LGPL-2/2.1/3, AGPL-3, EUPL, OSL (SPDX IDs complets)
- fail-on-severity: critical (CVE, en complément de pip-audit)
- comment-summary-in-pr: résumé diff dépendances posté automatiquement sur la PR

Repo public → disponible sans GitHub Advanced Security.
Runs uniquement sur pull_request vers main (pas sur push).

commit.message:
test(recordflow): add lazy auth and fire-and-forget polling tests

Entity flows are now fire-and-forget (engine.fire()), so the existing
entity test polls with asyncio.sleep for async record creation. Adds
TestLazyAuthentication class verifying that _ensure_authenticated()
logs in the ClarinetClient on first engine use without prior login().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: let HTTPExceptions pass through global error handler

The global exception handler was catching HTTPExceptions raised by
endpoint error handlers, swallowing the actual error detail. Now
HTTPExceptions pass through so FastAPI returns the real error message.

commit.message:
refactor(study): add RecordFlow entity triggers to StudyService

Entity-creation triggers (patient, study, series) now fire via
engine.fire() inside StudyService rather than in routers via
BackgroundTasks. The engine is injected as an optional dependency,
keeping StudyService functional when RecordFlow is disabled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix ghost mode: preserve original material colors + increase contrast

- Stop overriding emissive color to white (was washing out all parts)
- Store original emissive, apply soft steel-blue glow only on highlight
- Increase highlight emissiveIntensity 0.10 → 0.25
- Lower ghost opacity 0.12 → 0.08 for better contrast
- Boost scene lighting for clearer visibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Complete Phase 1 & 2 replication of MacDonald, Fagan & Geller (2016)

Phase 1: All 5 models (crime + arrest, 10 outcomes each) replicated
using fixest::fepois on raw incident-level data. Model 1 coefficients
match within 1-3% of published values across all 20 outcomes.

Phase 2: Permutation test (1,000 iterations) confirms true estimates
fall far outside placebo distribution (p<0.001 for both crime and
arrest). Detailed diagnostics logged in CHANGELOG.md.

commit.message:
fix: replace supabaseAdmin with authenticated client to fix 401 errors

The SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY was a placeholder, causing all admin
queries to fail with 401. Switched to using the authenticated user's
Supabase client with proper RLS policies instead. Added missing RLS
policies for reports UPDATE and credit_transactions INSERT.

commit.message:
refactor(recordflow): unify action dispatch with FlowContext dataclass

Replaces three separate action dispatcher paths (record, entity, file)
with a single FlowContext dataclass and unified _execute_action method.
Adds fire() for fire-and-forget background tasks, _ensure_authenticated()
for lazy client login, and _maybe_await() for sync/async function calls.
Reduces engine.py by ~120 lines while preserving all trigger semantics.
